response.original_title: JUR-612 息子の友人ともう5年間、セフレ関係を続けていますー。 年下の子と不埒な火遊び…中出し情事に溺れる私。椎名ゆな
response.overview: "Am I not good enough? Yuna's lover..." Five years ago, on that day, my relationship with Hajime changed dramatically. After discovering my husband's infidelity, Hajime comforted me with a clumsy kiss. That night, I decided to grant Hajime's wish. Partly as a way to spite my husband, but it was also a moment when I cherished the innocent Hajime. From then on, we continued to yearn for each other, and after five years, our relationship began to change...
response.title: JUR-612 I've Been Having A Sex Friend Relationship With My Son's Friend For The Past Five Years. I'm Having An Indecent Affair With A Younger Guy... I'm Addicted To Creampie Love Affairs. Yuna Shiina
